properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Midnight Staring at the bills and rubbing Red eyes Ain't adding up to nothing but some hard times He's feeling like a failure in life

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Head down Part of him is tempted just to Skip town But deep inside he knows enough to cry out God, I'm tired of fighting this fight

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I'm running low on faith But I won't run away

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Tonight I'm gonna fix my eyes On the only Hope who satisfies my heart You are the One I'm running to Everything that's good and right and true Jesus, I'm coming after who You are, you are The One I'm running to

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Late shift she's working hard providing for her three kids She hasn't seen her husband'cause their stretched thin Nobody told her it would be this hard

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: There's no end in sight, but she says no compromise

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Tonight I'm gonna fix my eyes On the only Hope who satisfies my heart You are the One I'm running to Everything that's good and right and true Jesus, I'm coming after who You are, you are the One I'm running to

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: So much I don't understand In the middle of this circumstance But I know my life is in Your Hands

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Tonight I'm gonna fix my eyes On the only Hope who satisfies, my heart You are the One Everything that's good and right and true Jesus, I'm coming after who You are, you are The One I'm running to (the One I'm running to)

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: The One I'm running to I'm coming after you
